name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality Replica】M82551 👏👏 This Brazza wallet features vividly colored calfskin trim, making the Monogram Macassar canvas look more modern. The refined interior features card slots, compartments, and a zippered coin pocket. Dimensions: 19x19x2.
